yosys.name: Yosys Open Synthesis Suite
yosys.desc: Extensible Verilog RTL synthesis suite. Synthesizes Verilog to gate-level netlists for FPGA/ASIC.

dc.name: Synopsys Design Compiler
dc.desc: Industry-standard RTL synthesis tool. Transforms RTL to gate-level netlist with timing/area/power optimization.

genus.name: Cadence Genus Synthesis
genus.desc: High-performance RTL synthesis with starrc-based topographical mode.

openroad.name: OpenROAD
openroad.desc: Autonomous RTL-to-GDSII flow. Floorplan, placement, CTS, routing, STA.

openlane.name: OpenLane
openlane.desc: Automated ASIC design flow from RTL to GDSII. Wraps Yosys + OpenROAD + KLayout.

librelane.name: LibreLane
librelane.desc: Successor to OpenLane. Modular ASIC implementation flow infrastructure.

innovus.name: Cadence Innovus
innovus.desc: Industry-standard P&R tool. Global/detailed placement, CTS (CCOpt), NanoRoute, timing optimization.

icc2.name: Synopsys IC Compiler II
icc2.desc: Next-gen physical design tool. Galaxy Place & Route, CTS, timing-driven optimisation.

opensta.name: OpenSTA
opensta.desc: Gate-level static timing analysis engine. Reads Liberty, Verilog, SPEF, SDC.

opentimer.name: OpenTimer
opentimer.desc: High-performance timing analysis tool. Path-based and graph-based analysis.

primetime.name: Synopsys PrimeTime
primetime.desc: Industry sign-off STA. Multi-corner/multi-mode (OCV/AOCV/SOCV), timing sign-off, power analysis.

tempus.name: Cadence Tempus Timing
tempus.desc: Sign-off timing analysis. ECOpt-based timing closure, path-based analysis.

vcs.name: Synopsys VCS
vcs.desc: Industry-leading Verilog/SystemVerilog/VHDL simulator. Full 4-state, UVM, coverage.

xcelium.name: Cadence Xcelium
xcelium.desc: Multi-language simulator. Native SystemVerilog, VHDL, Verilog-AMS.

klayout.name: KLayout
klayout.desc: GDSII/OASIS layout viewer and editor. DRC/LVS via runsets.

magic.name: Magic VLSI
magic.desc: Interactive layout editor with DRC extraction.

calibre.name: Siemens Calibre
calibre.desc: Industry sign-off DRC/LVS/xRC. Metal fill, antenna, density checks.

icv.name: Synopsys IC Validator
icv.desc: DRC/LVS/ERC sign-off tool. StarRC integration for parasitic extraction.

abc.name: ABC
abc.desc: Logic synthesis and verification system. Boolean rewriting and mapping.

lec.name: Cadence Conformal LEC
lec.desc: Logic equivalence checking. Compares RTL vs gate-level vs physical netlist. Formally proves functional equivalence.

formality.name: Synopsys Formality
formality.desc: Formal logic equivalence verification. Compares golden vs implementation netlists.

conformal-eco.name: Cadence Conformal ECO
conformal-eco.desc: Functional ECO implementation. Incremental netlist changes without full re-synthesis. Supports both functional and timing-driven ECO.

vivado.name: Xilinx Vivado
vivado.desc: Xilinx/AMD FPGA synthesis, P&R, timing analysis, bitstream generation. Supports 7-series, UltraScale, Versal.

quartus.name: Intel Quartus Prime
quartus.desc: Intel/Altera FPGA synthesis, P&R, timing analysis. Supports Stratix, Cyclone, MAX.

vtr.name: VTR (Verilog-to-Routing)
vtr.desc: Academic FPGA CAD flow. Architecture exploration + place & route.

cocotb.name: cocotb
cocotb.desc: Coroutine-based cosimulation library for writing VHDL/Verilog testbenches in Python.

symbiyosys.name: SymbiYosys
symbiyosys.desc: Front-end for Yosys-based formal verification flows.

ghdl.name: GHDL
ghdl.desc: VHDL simulator with full IEEE library support.

questa.name: Siemens Questa
questa.desc: Advanced functional verification platform. Multi-language (SV/VHDL/Verilog/UVM), formal+simulation integrated.

modelsim.name: Intel ModelSim
modelsim.desc: HDL simulation tool for functional verification. VHDL/Verilog/SystemVerilog.

vc-formal.name: Synopsys VC Formal
vc-formal.desc: Formal property verification. FPV, equivalence checking, formal-based connectivity.

jaspergold.name: Cadence JasperGold
jaspergold.desc: Formal verification platform. Property checking, equivalence checking, connectivity verification.

virtuoso.name: Cadence Virtuoso
virtuoso.desc: Full-custom IC design platform. Schematic entry, simulation (Spectre), layout (XL/GXL), DRC/LVS.

custom-compiler.name: Synopsys Custom Compiler
custom-compiler.desc: Custom/analogue layout design environment. Schematic-driven layout, auto routing.

spyglass.name: Synopsys SpyGlass
spyglass.desc: RTL lint/CDC/RDC analysis. Design rule checking, clock domain crossing, reset domain crossing.

dft-compiler.name: Synopsys DFT Compiler
dft-compiler.desc: Design-for-Test insertion. Scan chain, ATPG, BIST, boundary scan (IEEE 1149.1).

modus.name: Cadence Modus DFT
modus.desc: DFT insertion and test. Scan synthesis, ATPG, compression, BIST.

synplify.name: Synopsys Synplify
synplify.desc: FPGA synthesis tool. Supports Xilinx, Intel/Altera, Lattice, Microchip FPGAs.

diamond.name: Lattice Diamond
diamond.desc: Lattice FPGA design suite. Synthesis, P&R, timing analysis for ECP5, Nexus, CertusPro.

redhawk.name: ANSYS RedHawk
redhawk.desc: Power integrity and EM/ESD analysis. On-chip power grid, IR drop, electromigration.

totem.name: Synopsys Totem
totem.desc: Full-chip power integrity. IR drop, EM, ESD, thermal analysis for custom/digital designs.

prime-time-si.name: Synopsys PrimeTime SI
prime-time-si.desc: Signal integrity analysis. Crosstalk-induced delay, noise, glitches. Sign-off SI.

tempus-si.name: Cadence Tempus SI
tempus-si.desc: Sign-off signal integrity. Crosstalk analysis, noise budget, SI-driven optimisation.

hal.name: Cadence HAL
hal.desc: RTL lint and CDC analysis. Design rule checks, semantic checks, clock domain crossing.

ieee-1149.name: IEEE 1149.1 (JTAG)
ieee-1149.desc: Standard for boundary scan test access. Used by DFT tools (DFT Compiler, Modus) for chip-level test.

ieee-1500.name: IEEE 1500 (WIF)
ieee-1500.desc: Standard for embedded core test. Wrapper serial/parallel interface for IP core test.

ieda.name: iEDA
ieda.desc: Open-source EDA infrastructure and tools from Netlist to GDS.

starrc.name: Synopsys StarRC
starrc.desc: Parasitic extraction tool. Extracts RC parasitics from layout for sign-off STA.

quantus.name: Cadence Quantus QRC
quantus.desc: Parasitic extraction. QRC technology for accurate RC modelling.

voltus.name: Cadence Voltus
voltus.desc: Power sign-off. IR drop analysis, EM/ESD checks, dynamic/static power.

primepower.name: Synopsys PrimePower
primepower.desc: Gate-level power analysis. Vector-based and vectorless power estimation.
